def has_valid_items(items: list) -> bool:
    valid = [item for item in items if item.is_valid()]
    return bool(valid)


def check_permissions(permissions: list[str]) -> bool:
    granted = list(filter(is_granted, permissions))
    if granted:
        return True
    return False


def find_errors(logs: list[str]) -> bool:
    errors = [line for line in logs if "ERROR" in line]
    return len(errors) > 0


def any_active(users: list) -> bool:
    active_users = list(u for u in users if u.active)
    return len(active_users) > 0
